scripts.deploy:workers: npm run deploy:worker:geocode && npm run deploy:worker:place && npm run deploy:worker:sync
scripts.check: node --check app/config.js && node --check app/version.js && node --check app/sw.js && node --check app/place.js && node --check app/model.js && node --check app/main.js && node --check app/api.js && node --check app/storage.js && node --check app/sync.js && node -e "JSON.parse(require('node:fs').readFileSync('app/manifest.webmanifest', 'utf8'))" && node --check workers/place/src/index.js && node --check workers/geocode/src/index.js && node --check workers/sync/src/index.js && node --test test/*.test.js
